stemHtml: You have plotted two points on a Lambert Conformal Conic chart, point A (30°N 30°E) and point B (30°N 30°W), the difference between the rhumb line track and the straight line track is 15°. Then you plot two other positions on the same chart, position C (40°N 30°W) and D (40°N 30°E), what will be the difference between the rhumb line track and the straight line track between C and D?
